Info

Defines ats_utilities.logging package.

class ats_utilities.logging.ATSLogger(ats_name: str | None = None, ats_log_stdout: bool = True, ats_log_file: str | None = None, logger_instance: IATSLogger | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: object

Defines class ATSLogger with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the ATS logging mechanism. ATS logger mechanism.

It defines:

attributes:
ATS_CRITICAL - Critical log level.
ATS_DEBUG - Debug log level.
ATS_ERROR - Error log level.
ATS_INFO - Info log level.
ATS_WARNING - Warning log level.
__logger - Prepared logger instance or default logger.
__reporter - Message reporter for logging operations.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
methods:
__init__ - Initials ATSLogger constructor.
write_log - Writes message to log output.
ATS_CRITICAL = 50¶
ATS_DEBUG = 10¶
ATS_ERROR = 40¶
ATS_INFO = 20¶
ATS_WARNING = 30¶
write_log(message: str | None, ctrl: int, verbose: bool = False) → bool[source]¶

Writes message to log output.

Parameters:

  • message (<Optional[str]>) – Log message for log output | None

  • ctrl (<int>) – Control flag (debug, warning, critical, errors, info)

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Returns:

True (successfully logged message) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None

class ats_utilities.logging.DefaultLogLevels(value, names=<not given>, *values, module=None, qualname=None, type=None, start=1, boundary=None)[source]¶

Bases: int, Enum

Defines class DefaultLogLevels with attribute(s) and method(s). Log levels for the ATS default logging mechanism. It defines:

attributes:
ATS_LOG_DEBUG - Debug log level from logging module.
ATS_LOG_INFO - Info log level from logging module.
ATS_LOG_WARNING - Warning log level from logging module.
ATS_LOG_ERROR - Error log level from logging module.
ATS_LOG_CRITICAL - Critical log level from logging module.
methods:

None

ATS_LOG_CRITICAL = 50¶
ATS_LOG_DEBUG = 10¶
ATS_LOG_ERROR = 40¶
ATS_LOG_INFO = 20¶
ATS_LOG_WARNING = 30¶
static _generate_next_value_(name, start, count, last_values)¶

Generate the next value when not given.

name: the name of the member start: the initial start value or None count: the number of existing members last_values: the list of values assigned

_member_map_ = {'ATS_LOG_CRITICAL': DefaultLogLevels.ATS_LOG_CRITICAL, 'ATS_LOG_DEBUG': DefaultLogLevels.ATS_LOG_DEBUG, 'ATS_LOG_ERROR': DefaultLogLevels.ATS_LOG_ERROR, 'ATS_LOG_INFO': DefaultLogLevels.ATS_LOG_INFO, 'ATS_LOG_WARNING': DefaultLogLevels.ATS_LOG_WARNING}¶
_member_names_ = ['ATS_LOG_DEBUG', 'ATS_LOG_INFO', 'ATS_LOG_WARNING', 'ATS_LOG_ERROR', 'ATS_LOG_CRITICAL']¶
_member_type_¶

alias of int

_new_member_(**kwargs)¶

Create and return a new object. See help(type) for accurate signature.

_unhashable_values_ = []¶
_use_args_ = True¶
_value2member_map_ = {10: DefaultLogLevels.ATS_LOG_DEBUG, 20: DefaultLogLevels.ATS_LOG_INFO, 30: DefaultLogLevels.ATS_LOG_WARNING, 40: DefaultLogLevels.ATS_LOG_ERROR, 50: DefaultLogLevels.ATS_LOG_CRITICAL}¶
_value_repr_()¶

Return repr(self).

class ats_utilities.logging.DefaultLogger(ats_name: str | None = None, ats_log_stdout: bool = True, ats_log_file: str | None = None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, configure_logging: bool = True, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IATSLogger

Defines class DefaultLogger with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the ATS logging mechanism. Default logger mechanism.

It defines:

attributes:
ATS_LOG_DEBUG - Debug log level (redefinition).
ATS_LOG_INFO - Info log level (redefinition).
ATS_LOG_WARNING - Warning log level (redefinition).
ATS_LOG_ERROR - Error log level (redefinition).
ATS_LOG_CRITICAL - Critical log level (redefinition).
__logger_name - ATS name.
__log_stdout - Logging to stdout (default).
__log_file - Logging to file.
__checker - Checker for parameter validation.
__reporter - Formatter for error reports.
__logger - Python Logger instance.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.

methods:
__init__ - Initials DefaultLogger constructor.
write_log - Writes message to log file.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

LOG_FORMATS¶

alias of LogFormats

LOG_LEVELS¶

alias of DefaultLogLevels

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
write_log(message: str | None, ctrl: int, verbose: bool = False) → bool[source]¶

Writes message to log file.

Parameters:

  • message (<Optional[str]>) – Log message for log file | None

  • ctrl (<int>) – Control flag (debug, warning, critical, errors, info)

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Returns:

True (successfully logged message) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

ATSTypeError

class ats_utilities.logging.IATSLogger[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines interface IATSLogger with attribute(s) and method(s). Interface for the ATS logging mechanism.

It defines:

attributes:
LOG_FORMATS - Log formats.
LOG_LEVELS - Log levels.
methods:
write_log - Writes message to log output.
LOG_FORMATS¶

alias of LogFormats

LOG_LEVELS¶

alias of LogLevels

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract write_log(message: str | None, ctrl: int, verbose: bool = False) → bool[source]¶

Writes message to log output.

Parameters:

  • message (<Optional[str]>) – Log message for log output | None

  • ctrl (<int>) – Control flag (debug, warning, critical, errors, info)

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Returns:

True (successfully logged message) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

class ats_utilities.logging.LogFormats(value, names=<not given>, *values, module=None, qualname=None, type=None, start=1, boundary=None)[source]¶

Bases: str, Enum

Defines class LogFormats with attribute(s) and method(s). Log formats for the ATS logging mechanism.

It defines:

attributes:
ATS_LOG_MSG_FORMAT - Log message format.
ATS_LOG_DATE_FORMAT - Log date format.
methods:

None

ATS_LOG_DATE_FORMAT = '%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p'¶
ATS_LOG_MSG_FORMAT = '%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s'¶
static _generate_next_value_(name, start, count, last_values)¶

Generate the next value when not given.

name: the name of the member start: the initial start value or None count: the number of existing members last_values: the list of values assigned

_member_map_ = {'ATS_LOG_DATE_FORMAT': LogFormats.ATS_LOG_DATE_FORMAT, 'ATS_LOG_MSG_FORMAT': LogFormats.ATS_LOG_MSG_FORMAT}¶
_member_names_ = ['ATS_LOG_MSG_FORMAT', 'ATS_LOG_DATE_FORMAT']¶
_member_type_¶

alias of str

_new_member_(**kwargs)¶

Create and return a new object. See help(type) for accurate signature.

_unhashable_values_ = []¶
_use_args_ = True¶
_value2member_map_ = {'%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s': LogFormats.ATS_LOG_MSG_FORMAT, '%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p': LogFormats.ATS_LOG_DATE_FORMAT}¶
_value_repr_()¶

Return repr(self).

ATS_LOG_INFO - Info log level.
ATS_LOG_WARNING - Warning log level.

class ats_utilities.logging.LoggerFormatsProtocol(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Protocol

Defines class LoggerFormatsProtocol with attribute(s) and method(s). Protocol for log formats in the ATS logging mechanism.

It defines:

attributes:
ATS_LOG_MSG_FORMAT - Log message format (string).
ATS_LOG_DATE_FORMAT - Log date format (string).
methods:

None

ATS_LOG_DATE_FORMAT: ClassVar[str]¶
ATS_LOG_MSG_FORMAT: ClassVar[str]¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
_is_protocol = True¶
class ats_utilities.logging.LoggerLevelsProtocol(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Protocol

Defines class LoggerLevelsProtocol with attribute(s) and method(s). Protocol for log levels in the ATS logging mechanism.

It defines:

attributes:
ATS_LOG_DEBUG - Debug log level.
ATS_LOG_INFO - Info log level.
ATS_LOG_WARNING - Warning log level.
ATS_LOG_ERROR - Error log level.
ATS_LOG_CRITICAL - Critical log level.
methods:

None
